jokes.text: "Wow" backwards is "wow." Did you know that?
jokes.setup: Larry sharing vacation details with guest
jokes.explanation: Simple wordplay observation, economical but not particularly clever or character-specific

dialogue.speaker: Larry
dialogue.line: "Wow" backwards is "wow." Did you know that?

jokes.text: "Wow" upside-down is "Mom," and Mom upside-down is Dad's favorite thing
jokes.explanation: Clever escalation from innocent wordplay to sexual humor with good misdirection

dialogue.speaker: Larry
dialogue.line: "Wow" upside-down is "Mom," and Mom upside-down is Dad's favorite thing

jokes.text: We went to Egypt with my in-laws who are a lot of fun... if you like being in a vault with them

dialogue.speaker: Larry

jokes.text: I don't know what that means, but thank you for laughing

dialogue.speaker: Larry
dialogue.line: I don't know what that means, but thank you for laughing

jokes.text: But nobody ever goes there because it Sphinx back there

dialogue.line: I'm a big Jamie Farr fan and I love women... so the combination just turned me on major
